enrichment method: the lactylated peptides were enriched with anti-Kla antibodies.
instrument: the Thermo Scientific Q Exactive HFX
labeling: peptides were identified by liquid chromatography/tandem mass spectroscopy (LC-MS/MS) analysis and database searching.
reduction reagent: Dithiothreitol (DTT) was added to a final concentration of 10 mM
reduction concentration: Dithiothreitol (DTT) was added to a final concentration of 10 mM
